description: Product Description ZAZIE HAIR BRUSH FOLDING IN DISP Ingredients Calcium Carbonate,Aqua,Glycerin,Hydrated Silica,Arginine,Lauryl Glucoside,Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate,Sodium Monofluorophosphate,Xanthan Gum,Aroma,Benzyl Alcohol,Sodium Bicarbonate,Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate,Sodium Saccharin,Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose,Sodium Hydroxide,CI 73360, CI 74160. Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to a toothbrush and brush your teeth for two minutes, twice a day. Safety Warning Contains benzyl alcohol. Discontinue use if irritated. Consult a doctor for children under 2 years.
